   "reasoning": "I'm frustrated with the system as it is, and the funding cut has made things worse. We need to prioritize the quality of education, not just throw money at the problem. That's why I'm recommending high intensities for teacher incentives, resource reallocation, and transparency reports - these will actually raise the bar, not just pad the bottom. I'm less keen on student scholarships and counseling programs, they might help some students but won't fix the underlying issues.",
